content: I am looooooving poison stacking, is there anyway to improve my main team to keep doing that with what I have right now? What characters and wheels should I aim for? Is this team enough to carry me to the newest content? Any additional advice is appreciated!

Hey there.

If you love poison, you're gonna be exstatic about Arachne's final verdict when she comes back.

Liz can be a usefull addition ( especially when you get her dupes from the standard banners ) and you can pair her with Winkle for durability.

Quick reminder : you will want 5 functionnal teams in the long run, so I suggest you go through the whoooole rooster of awakener trials on the record button ( in the botoom section ).

I am a fan of Saya myself but I don't feel she goes so well with poison, her corruption leans more towards direct damage such as tentacles from the eaquor realm ( she goes great with Aurita whom you will get for free by moving through the story )

[AT LEAST 160 FREE STANDARD PULLS]

Go to the thread below for helpful Beginner guides and Redemption codes 

https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1509396840330825758/1509396840330825758

[AT LEAST 160 FREE STANDARD PULLS]

Go to the thread below for helpful Beginner guides and Redemption codes 

https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1509396840330825758/1509396840330825758

If you want to stick to Chaos-Caro, Agrippa ( standard pool ) would be a fine substitute for Aigis. If you chance upon Thaïs ( limited pool but you can luck upon her in standard ), she's a very nice support as well.

Who's arachne

5 teams- wha whoa damn

Gotcha on Saya. I just find it funny when poison occasionally fizzles out, I can just beat up people instead- and thanks for bringing up eaqour, she'll be going there once I get more settled in. The tentacles seem fun from what little I've used them

Ill keep an eye out for agrippa and thais

Thanks for the quick response!

Arachne guides:

Angbak- <https://www.reddit.com/r/Morimens/s/t0G2ZHRw6Q>
 
All opinions and views expressed in these guides belong to the content creator and are not officially endorsed

Don't worry about the 5-teams thing, it won't trouble you until further into the game ^^

Just an incentive to invest into your favorite awakeners weither you regularky use them or not.

About the ultra realm ( that's where Arachne belongs so you would go chaos-ultra or caro-ultra ) : it's a bit more tricky and shelters a couple weird mechanics, mainly focusing on the first card you play each round.
Worth a try but it's just fine if you don't dwelve too deep into them right now.
I won't spoil what Arachne does further until you go through her free trail ; )
Aye, thanks again

Hi there.

That's quite the bland view of this game you offer ^^'

Your team is fine as-is for a start and will get you through the first few chapters.
As for the wheels, I would recommand you build at least three solid teams before considering pulling for wheels, then awakener duplicates, then 5 teams, then wheels duplicates.

You should not have much issue raising all your awakeners to lvl 20 then 40 and their skills to lvl 3 then 5 then 6, starting with your main 3 teams.
As a side note : limited characters roll back in the banners but the really doesn't happen often. So you should grab any you fnacy before they're gone.

[AT LEAST 160 FREE STANDARD PULLS]

Go to the thread below for helpful Beginner guides and Redemption codes 

https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1509396840330825758/1509396840330825758

The /<insert command> gives you access to Ærica with a buch of usefull intel.

Welcome aboard : )
Alright thanks for the info
Regarding this, is there a channel for bot usage or smth

Hello there : )

If you only want a fourth, Saya is a great match for Aurita : her draw and copy will wastly enhance Aurita's Aliemus generation.

You might mant to consider swapping either Salvador or Caecus for Corposant, too.
Caecus is probably easier to master at first.

Hey there.

I'll let others comment but for now, I would sugget trying to replace Aigis with Agripa for poison buildup or Faint if you really get to close to the brink.

As for pulling : I absolutely advise *not* to farm wheels dupes until you have 5 solid teams ( lvl 40, skills lvl 3). Or three at least.

And about starting the boss figth with 25 % HP : are you worried about losing health on a health consuming team ?
The lower your remaing HP the more efficient the embryo and furnace generation : )
